He's very kind i promise. I tested him and he tried to make romance as soon as i saved him..? I don't know how to change that. I specifically said he doesn't have a crush on User here.

Ah, i didn't mention User in the intro, i mean i did but only at the start. Where the action is there isn't any mention of User so you can perfectly do whatever you want. The fact is: Keep Ethan safe.

I had to make the 3 bullies + Ethan's 2 friends "Side characters" because the bot wasn't working properly. Hopefully it will work now.

I can't make fancy bots due to me not being able to use things such as deepseek o any other proxy as you need to pay, so i use JLLM, so if it works with it, it should work perfectly for everything else i hope.
